'''âp-r-b-z''' ('''kaparbezoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:heist|heist]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-r-b-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:heist|heist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-r-b-z
|-
! Lemma
| kaparbezoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiparbezoko|thiparbezoko]] || [[word:jiparbezoko|jiparbezoko]] || [[word:shiparbezoko|shiparbezoko]] || [[word:kiparbezoko|kiparbezoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoparbezoko|thoparbezoko]] || [[word:joparbezoko|joparbezoko]] || [[word:shoparbezoko|shoparbezoko]] || [[word:koparbezoko|koparbezoko]]
|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
